Careers
Join us in improving lives in Calgary and the surrounding area

United Way of Calgary and Area positively contributes to the lives of more than 270,000 individuals every year. This doesn’t happen by chance—it takes dedication, passion, talent, and a strong desire to make the world a better place.

Our culture is about caring—for one another, our community, and the results we achieve together. Ready to do your best work? Join our team!

Available career opportunities

Vice President, Finance
Permanent, Full-time


Posted Wednesday, May 13, 2026 / Closes when a suitable candidate is found.

Meet the people behind United Way

Our team believes in what we do. Every day, we work to make our community a better place—and we definitely like to have fun while we do it!
